Description.value: Bloodfall biome wandering rebalance: removes flat T6-T8 prob (0.20 across all biomes) and reapplies a T6 base x 0.7^n decay curve with biome tier ceilings. Forest series fully purged, ForestDowntown T6 only, BurntForest T6-T7, Desert T6-T8, Snow T6-T9, Wasteland series all tiers (T6-T15 with curve), Downtown T6-T8. BloodMoon (feralHordeStageGS80+) untouched preserves finale spike. Pure XML, csv op=remove + add, loads after Bloodfall.
